gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/181)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/181)
text: إِذَا صَحِبْتَ فَاصْحَبْ نَحْوَكَ وَ لَا تَصْحَبَنَّ مَنْ يَكْفِيكَ فَإِنَّ ذَلِكَ مَذَلَّةٌ لِلْمُؤْمِنِ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Hammad Bin Usman, from Hareyz, from the one who mentioned it,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When you accompany, so accompany someone like you, and do not accompany the one who suffices (needless) from you, for in that, is humiliation for the Believer’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali has narrated from his father from Hammad ibn ‘Uthman from Hariz from those who he has mentioned who has said the following: “Abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Accompany someone like yourself. Do not accompany one who suffices you; it is humiliation for a believing person.’”
